en.name: M1A "Tony Conversion"
en.description: Originally a Springfield Armory M1A, a civilian semi-automatic clone of the M14. Tony saw potential where others saw a safe, slow rifle. In his workshop, the fire control group was rebuilt, the action tuned, and the rifle converted to full-auto. What was once a precise semi-auto battle rifle is now a brutal fully automatic tool capable of laying down a heavy volley in a firefight. Tony claims it’s 'semi-civilian at heart, full-battle in practice.'
